offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate demand forecasting causes stockouts. We provide replenishment orders instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inability to accurately forecast demand leads to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among sellers
try_it: Let users try demand forecasting with historical sales data.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
